title: I am building wealth that outlives me
subtitle: A two-part energy statement for releasing inherited scarcity and allowing wealth to build across generations.
excerpt: A short energy statement from Day 41 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release the belief that lasting wealth is for other family lines, then allow the idea that you are the one who shifts the pattern.
sourceNotes: Adapted from Day 41 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Build wealth that outlasts you."

practice.whenToUse: Use when thinking about long-term legacy or generational wealth still feels presumptuous rather than possible.

content.text: A short energy statement from Day 41 of the MONEY program. Two moves: release what was inherited, then allow a different pattern to build.

I release the belief that lasting wealth is for other families and not mine. I release the inherited pattern that money does not accumulate across generations in my line. I let go of the story that I am not the one who changes this.
I allow myself to be the one who shifts the pattern. I allow wealth to build steadily and pass forward. I am building wealth that outlives me.
Read the release statement slowly, then pause. Read the allow statement and let the words land.
Adapted from Day 41 of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
